[event]
# Switch
type=event
location=21,6,1,1
activate=on_trigger
hotspot=location
mapmod=object,12,12,148;object,12,13,238;object,13,12,182;object,13,13,265;object,21,6,271;collision,12,12,1;collision,12,13,1;collision,13,12,1;collision,13,13,2
repeat=false
soundfx=soundfx/door_open.ogg
tooltip=Switch

[event]
# Treasure Chest
type=event
location=13,13,1,1
activate=on_trigger
hotspot=location
loot=loot/il_chest_common.txt
loot_count=2
mapmod=object,13,13,267
repeat=false
requires_tile=object,21,6,271
soundfx=soundfx/wood_open.ogg
tooltip=Treasure Chest

[event]
# Sliding stone SFX
type=event
location=13,13,1,1
activate=static
repeat=false
requires_tile=object,21,6,271
soundfx=soundfx/environment/stone_open.ogg,13,13,false

[event]
# brazier sound effect
type=event
location=11,19,1,1
activate=on_load
soundfx=soundfx/environment/open_fire_loop.ogg

[event]
# Water dripping
type=event
location=12,17,1,1
activate=on_load
soundfx=soundfx/environment/cave_droplets_loop.ogg

[event]
# Barrel
type=event
location=12,16,1,1
activate=on_trigger
hotspot=location
loot=loot/il_chest_common.txt
loot_count=1,2
mapmod=object,12,16,288
repeat=false
soundfx=soundfx/wood_open.ogg
tooltip=Barrel

[event]
# Urn
type=event
location=9,6,1,1
activate=on_trigger
hotspot=location
loot=loot/il_chest_common.txt
loot_count=1
mapmod=object,9,6,269
repeat=false
soundfx=soundfx/inventory/inventory_object.ogg
tooltip=Urn

[event]

type=event
location=20,4,3,3
activate=on_trigger
cooldown=2s
power=378
power_path=21,5
repeat=true
